/tmp/codeql-scratch-a0efab335a3dc736/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -rdynamic -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/mapcache.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/mapcache.dir/__/common/core.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mapcache.dir/__/common/malloc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mapcache.dir/__/common/showmsg.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mapcache.dir/__/common/strlib.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mapcache.dir/__/__/3rdparty/libconfig/grammar.c.o CMakeFiles/mapcache.dir/__/__/3rdparty/libconfig/libconfig.c.o CMakeFiles/mapcache.dir/__/__/3rdparty/libconfig/scanctx.c.o CMakeFiles/mapcache.dir/__/__/3rdparty/libconfig/scanner.c.o CMakeFiles/mapcache.dir/__/__/3rdparty/libconfig/strbuf.c.o CMakeFiles/mapcache.dir/__/common/des.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mapcache.dir/__/common/grfio.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mapcache.dir/__/common/utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mapcache.dir/mapcache.cpp.o -o /home/runner/work/moonlight/moonlight/mapcache  -lm -Wl,-Bstatic -lrt -Wl,-Bdynamic -lz
